company_summary: Sprinklr is an enterprise SaaS platform offering unified customer experience management (CXM) across marketing, customer service, and social media channels. The company went public in 2021 and serves large enterprise clients managing digital customer interactions at scale. Sprinklr has been investing heavily in AI-powered features across its platform, including generative AI for customer support and insights.
fit_indicators: Product Operations roles require building and maintaining internal tooling and workflows — Sudheer built billing, attendance, and design approval systems at RNTBCI used daily across Nissan/Renault/Mitsubishi org, directly analogous experience

Sprinklr is an enterprise SaaS company with complex cross-functional operations — Sudheer's 4 years at RNTBCI supporting Nissan/Renault/Mitsubishi operations maps to understanding large enterprise internal coordination

Sprinklr is investing in AI-powered platform features — Sudheer is actively building multi-agent AI systems with Claude API, giving him hands-on AI product context relevant to Sprinklr's current strategic direction

Product Operations often involves microservices and API integrations across teams — Sudheer has direct production experience with microservices architecture and OKTA auth integration at enterprise scale

MBA-level strategic framing combined with hands-on engineering is a rare profile for Product Operations — Sudheer's Carlson STEM MBA plus 4 years enterprise engineering directly bridges the technical-to-business gap this role requires

contact_targets.title: Senior Product Operations Manager or Director of Product Operations
contact_targets.reason: Directly manages or owns the function this intern role sits within — best person to understand the actual day-to-day work and make a hiring recommendation

contact_targets.title: Senior Product Manager or Group PM
contact_targets.reason: Product Operations interns typically support PMs closely — a senior PM working on AI or platform products would see direct value in Sudheer's technical and AI background

contact_targets.title: MBA Recruiting or Early Talent Recruiter
contact_targets.reason: Sprinklr recruits MBA interns through structured programs — recruiter can confirm role scope and connect Sudheer to the right hiring manager if direct contacts are not accessible
